References in this report (this “Quarterly Report”) to “TMTG,” “we,” “us” or the “Company” refer to Trump Media & Technology Group Corp.
The increase was primarily due to $161,715.1 of unrealized losses on our equity securities, partially offset by $16,524.8 of realized gains from derivative instruments on our bitcoin related securities, and $36,977.3 of unrealized gains from net premiums received through the sale of written option contracts.
Proceeds of these equity sales under the terms of the SEPA were $449,874.6 (net of $513.5 of deferred offering costs).
The cash provided in the first quarter of 2026 consists of net proceeds from the exercise of warrants, compared to $8,060.8 used in the first quarter of 2025, mainly comprising the repurchase of common stock of $8,250.2, offset by $189.4 of net proceeds from the exercise of warrants."},{"url":"https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/1849635/000114036125040977/ef20054981_10q.htm","title":null,"content":"One advertising platform accounted for 85% and 94% of our total revenue for the nine months ended September 30, 2025 and 2024, respectively.

tavily.raw: {"query":"Trump Media DJT Q3 2024 earnings report net loss revenue decline SEC filing","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://www.cnbc.com/2025/02/14/trump-media-djt-earnings-report-2024.html","title":"Trump Media (DJT) earnings report 2024","content":"# Trump Media reports $400 million in 2024 losses. * Trump Media & Technology Group reported a $400.9 million net loss for the full year. * The company said it had to pay legal fees stemming from obstruction at the Biden-era Securities and Exchange Commission, and a revenue-sharing agreement negatively impacted revenue. Trump Media & Technology Group shares were down about 1% in extended trading on Friday after the operator of Truth Social released its 2024 results. The company's revenue declined 12% year over year, according to its annual report. The company saw its net loss widen to $400.9 million from $58.2 million in 2023. In 2024, Trump Media incurred merger-related legal fees because of obstruction from former President Biden's Securities and Exchange Commission, according to a statement. \"Additionally, revenue has varied as we selectively test a nascent advertising initiative on our Truth Social platform,\" the company said in the annual report.","score":0.94276565,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.stocktitan.net/news/DJT/tmtg-reports-third-quarter-2024-vof8e0211os0.html","title":"TMTG Reports Third Quarter 2024 Results","content":"Operating loss of $23.7 million in Q3 · Net loss of $19.2 million · Low revenue generation of $1.0 million · High legal expenses of $12.1 million","score":0.8464638,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.facebook.com/21WFMJ/posts/since-it-went-public-two-years-ago-trump-media-has-lost-more-than-11-billion/1388179940022928","title":"Since it went public two years ago, Trump Media has lost ...","content":"Trump Media has lost more than $1.1 billion. wiping out over $3.7 billion of Trump's paper profits.
